title: When shutting down the runtime we should always close the database
body:
Even if the storage fails to shutdown. This patch fixes on TODO.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Travis seems unhappy with go 1.8, but passes with go 1.9?
```
not ok 28 kill a running container by id with a bogus signal
# (in test file ./kpod_kill.bats, line 61)
#   `[ "$status" -eq 1 ]' failed
# 203c64e8607ff754c8da61468131cd17bb0af259be50d13bac829a6d8e6adf90
```

Tests are passing.
PTAL @mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat @baude @umohnani8 And merge.
